response:
The Platform Team notes there are currently 47 active feature flags, 23 of which come from releases older than 6 months, and is proposing a dedicated cleanup sprint that will reduce configuration complexity and speed up the test suite by approximately 12%.
As part of this sprint, the team plans to remove 15 feature flags that have already been 100% rolled out, and archive the 8 remaining old flags that are now dead code.
